releaseNotes:
- CG production now supports dynamic manga as a third output form, with a dedicated cloud director that plans, renders, and verifies portrait-format animated comic clips
- Lunaverse Agent can now start focused CG production directly from chat and offers contextual starter prompts for common story and asset tasks
- The Gallery now lets every asset category collapse, opens video and audio files in standalone previews, and copies canonical asset filenames from cards or detail headers
- Agent command activity is easier to scan with grouped consecutive steps and command details collapsed by default
- GPT-5.6 Sol is now available in place of GPT-5.5 for current Lunaverse Agent sessions
releaseNotesZh:
- CG 生产新增“动态漫画”作为第三种输出形态，并由专用云端导演完成竖屏动态漫画的规划、渲染与交付校验
- Lunaverse Agent 现可直接从对话启动聚焦的 CG 生产，并为常见故事与素材任务提供带上下文的起手提示
- 画廊现支持逐类收起素材、将视频和音频跳出独立预览，并可从素材卡片或详情标题一键复制 canonical 文件名
- Agent 命令活动现会合并连续步骤，并默认收起命令详情，长任务更易浏览
- Lunaverse Agent 的当前会话模型已用 GPT-5.6 Sol 取代 GPT-5.5
